config.#: MAQAO ONE View config -- cp2k_optimized, feature/nnp-native-spline
Optimised PURE-MPI fork: cell-list neighbour search, persistent
scratch buffers, CP2K-native Hermite splines, cache-conscious
gradient arrays, precomputed ACSF scaling factors.
Workload / parallelism identical to the master config so the
--compare-reports run isolates the optimisations (16 MPI x 1 OMP).
config.comments: cp2k_optimized feature/nnp-native-spline -- optimised pure-MPI NNP path. Compared against upstream master.
